_doc: Starter spell catalog used by the character-creation wizard. Each entry's `archetypes` list constrains which casters may learn it; omit to allow all casters. `level` 0 = cantrip. School codes match dnd5e: abj, con, div, enc, evo, ill, nec, trs. Optional `targeting` block: {kind: self|single|radius|cone|line|sphere|cube|point|multi, range_ft?, radius_ft?, anchor?: caster|target|point, max_targets?, self_only?}. Spells without a `targeting` block default to single-target inferred from `range`.

fire_bolt.name: Fire Bolt
fire_bolt.description: A mote of fire streaks toward a creature or object. On hit, 1d10 fire damage.

eldritch_blast.name: Eldritch Blast
eldritch_blast.description: A beam of crackling energy. On hit, 1d10 force damage.

ray_of_frost.name: Ray of Frost
ray_of_frost.description: A frigid beam. On hit, 1d8 cold damage and the target's speed is reduced by 10 ft.

chill_touch.name: Chill Touch
chill_touch.description: A spectral, skeletal hand reaches a creature within 120 ft. On hit, 1d8 necrotic damage and the target can't regain HP until the start of your next turn.

mage_hand.name: Mage Hand
mage_hand.description: A spectral hand you can manipulate to fetch, push, or open.

prestidigitation.name: Prestidigitation
prestidigitation.description: Minor magical tricks: light a candle, clean an object, change a flavor, etc.

light.name: Light
light.description: An object sheds bright light in a 20-ft radius.

magic_missile.name: Magic Missile
magic_missile.description: Three darts of magical force, each striking automatically for 1d4+1 force damage.

shield.name: Shield
shield.description: +5 AC until the start of your next turn, including against the triggering attack.

mage_armor.name: Mage Armor
mage_armor.description: An unarmoured creature's base AC becomes 13 + Dex mod for 8 hours.

hex.name: Hex
hex.description: Curse a target: +1d6 necrotic on your hits, disadvantage on one ability.

witch_bolt.name: Witch Bolt
witch_bolt.description: A beam of crackling energy: 1d12 lightning on hit; 1d12 each subsequent turn as an action.

burning_hands.name: Burning Hands
burning_hands.description: Sheet of flame in a 15-ft cone. Dex save or 3d6 fire damage.

charm_person.name: Charm Person
charm_person.description: Charm a humanoid you can see. Wis save negates.

sleep.name: Sleep
sleep.description: Roll 5d8: that many HP of creatures fall unconscious in a 20-ft sphere.

detect_magic.name: Detect Magic
detect_magic.description: Sense the presence and school of magic within 30 ft.

cure_wounds.name: Cure Wounds
cure_wounds.description: Touch a creature: regain 1d8 + spellcasting modifier HP.
